name: negotiate-ai
description: Universal negotiation simulator — practice any negotiation against an AI adversary with emotional modeling, cognitive bias detection, and optimal strategy planning

scripts.web: node -e "import('./src/web-app.mjs').then(async ({ startWebServer }) => { const app = await startWebServer(); console.log('NegotiateAI Web listening on http://127.0.0.1:' + app.address.port); })"
